name: GoFundMe
hero: Hello, GoFundMe. I built this page to also hold job-specific notes on how each milestone in my career connects to the Senior Product Designer role. I'm still adding work examples, so there'll be more here over the next few days.
now: TBD: A note for the GoFundMe team about what I'm focused on right now and how it lines up with the Senior Product Designer role on Heart.

milestones.pe-founded: Mentoring designers wasn't a side responsibility for me - I built a whole school around it. When the posting says 'raise the bar' through critiques, mentorship, and modeling craft, that's been my day job for six years, and doing it from inside a product team at GoFundMe is the version I want next.
